global_description: Large mammal with massive body, thick gray skin, long trunk, large ears, tusks, and pillar-like legs. The skin is rough and wrinkled, providing a distinctive texture. The trunk is flexible and elongated, used for various tasks. The ears are large and fan-like, aiding in temperature regulation.

part_details.trunk: Long, flexible, and muscular, extending from the face
part_details.ears: Large, fan-like, and thin, positioned on the sides of the head
part_details.tusks: Long, curved, and ivory-colored, extending from the upper jaw
part_details.legs: Thick, pillar-like, supporting the massive body

spatial_relations: Trunk extends from the front of the head
Ears positioned on sides of head
